core_mechanism: iterative local message-passing (belief-propagation) inference on a sparse bipartite factor graph, with a density-evolution recursion that tracks how the distribution of exchanged messages converges to a fixed point and thereby locates a performance threshold
brief_reason: The abstract states that inference is 'performed in an iterative manner, by applying message passing over the associated graph,' while 'discrete Density Evolution (DDE) is used to optimize performance,' which is exactly message passing on a sparse graph analyzed by a density-evolution recursion.
